title: Terminal int8 hardswish isolated retry block
hypothesis: Measure a fresh standalone hardswish activation block on a unique wrapper path while isolating evaluator-side submission retry behavior.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Can this isolated hardswish Layer 1 block be recovered via dashboard Resume after intentional submission failure on the remote evaluator?
include: single cheap Nangate45 sweep on a unique canonical wrapper path
exclude: paired L2 follow-on work until the long soak behavior is confirmed
follow_on_broad_sweep: optional broader parameter or seed sweep after the long soak settles

expected_benefit: Prove stable multi-evaluator L1 behavior on a fresh activation proposal line.
risks: May collapse to no-diff if canonical output paths are accidentally reused.

expected_result.reason: Establish fresh canonical evidence for the isolated resume-recovery proof.
